raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is a clear lateral contact point on the outer (right) side of box_2; the cup is not in the direct contact path so it will not be bumped during stabilization.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is braced in place so that forces applied to box_1 will not drag or rotate the attached box_2 during lifting preparation."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right sides of box_1 with enough clearance; the cup (in front of box_2) does not obstruct the arms' approach corridor; box_2 is stabilized to manage the attachment between box_1 and box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is firmly held by both end-effectors with lateral support, ready to be lifted while minimizing torsion from the attached box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already constrained laterally by both arms; there is sufficient vertical clearance above the boxes for a controlled lift; the robot can lift without colliding with the cup located in front of box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is picked up (no longer resting on the table) under dual-arm support, with the attached box_2 managed by the prior stabilization to prevent sudden swinging."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the right arm and there is a clear lateral contact point on the outer (right) side of box_2; the cup is not in the direct contact path so it will not be bumped during stabilization.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is braced in place so that forces applied to box_1 will not drag or rotate the attached box_2 during lifting preparation.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right sides of box_1 with enough clearance; the cup (in front of box_2) does not obstruct the arms' approach corridor; box_2 is stabilized to manage the attachment between box_1 and box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is firmly held by both end-effectors with lateral support, ready to be lifted while minimizing torsion from the attached box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already constrained laterally by both arms; there is sufficient vertical clearance above the boxes for a controlled lift; the robot can lift without colliding with the cup located in front of box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is picked up (no longer resting on the table) under dual-arm support, with the attached box_2 managed by the prior stabilization to prevent sudden swinging.
